title: rosettea rhinanthifolia var. exellii
side_effects: Rosettea rhinanthifolia var. exellii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, due to its high concentration of saponins and iridoids. Additionally, excessive consumption may lead to allergic reactions, such as hives and itching, in some individuals. Overuse can also cause an imbalance in blood sugar levels and electrolytes, potentially resulting in hypoglycemia and dehydration. In severe cases, improper use of rosettea rhinanthifolia var. exellii may even lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity.
